issues.description: The script does not yet implement the requirement to emit missing frontmatter fields as 'null' (AC-005).
issues.suggestion: Ensure the JSON serialization logic explicitly includes all schema keys, using null for missing values.

issues.description: The script does not implement graceful degradation for malformed frontmatter (AC-006).
issues.suggestion: Wrap the parsing logic in a try-except block to catch YAML errors, emit the task with 'parse_error': true, and continue processing.

issues.description: The positional TASK-ID argument for single-task lookup is not implemented (AC-007).
issues.suggestion: Update the argument parser to accept an optional TASK-ID and implement the lookup logic.

issues.description: The current test suite is insufficient to meet AC-008. It only covers 3 scenarios, whereas the AC requires coverage for empty projects, nested folders, malformed frontmatter, single-task lookup, and byte-stability.
issues.suggestion: Expand tests/unit/commands/test_task_status_json.py to include all scenarios listed in AC-008.

issues.description: The Player's report contains multiple claims of modified files that were actually unchanged in git.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the files_modified list in the report accurately reflects only the files changed during the turn.

criteria_verification.notes: File exists with main() and guard.
Recursive scanning logic is present and verified by tests.
JSON schema and sorting logic verified by tests.
No evidence of null-field emission implementation.
No evidence of malformed frontmatter handling.
No evidence of TASK-ID positional argument implementation.
Test coverage is significantly lower than required by the AC.
Lint/format check results were not provided/verified.

rationale: The implementation covers the basic scanning and parsing logic but fails to implement several critical functional requirements (error handling, CLI arguments, null-field emission) and lacks the comprehensive test suite required by the acceptance criteria.
